steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The claim states that Reckoning and Resilience is distinguished from prior exhibitions (like Across County Lines, a photography-only show) by spanning multiple artistic disciplines. The correct choice must provide evidence of multiple disciplines.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: Shows only a single discipline among the featured artists — does not prove breadth. ✗
  • Choice B: Addresses a factor unrelated to the range of disciplines in the exhibition. ✗
  • Choice C: Identifies three distinct disciplines — painting, photography, and textiles — directly proving the exhibition spans multiple disciplines. ✓
  • Choice D: Addresses a factor unrelated to the exhibition's disciplinary scope. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
